title: Burglar Alarm Central
description:
With this function block, all Burglar Alarm blocks can be controlled together.
Double-click on the block to open the dialogue for selecting the linked blocks

inputs.description: Toggles between arm / disarm. Presence sensors are used to trigger an alarm.
Toggles between arm / disarm. Presence sensors are not used to trigger an alarm.
Arms the alarm system. Presence sensors are used to trigger an alarm.
Arms the alarm system. Presence sensors are not used to trigger an alarm.
Arms the alarm system with a delay (Ard). Presence sensors are used to trigger an alarm.
Arms the alarm system with a delay (Ard). Presence sensors are not used to trigger an alarm.
Pulse: Outputs are reset / switched off. On: Block is locked. Dominating input. The name of the connected sensor is used in the user interface.
Confirms the current alarm and resets all alarm outputs. The alarm system remains armed.
Disables inputs (Tg), (Tgnp), (A), (Anp), (Ad), (Adnp) when On. (e.g Child lock, cleaning) Control via user interface is still possible.

outputs.description: Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

properties.description: All selected Alarm function blocks can be controlled together.
